org.arakhne.neteditor.io

Interface VectorialExporter

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractVectorialExporter, DotExporter, EpsExporter, EpsTeXExporter, GMLExporter, GraphMLExporter, GXLExporter, PdfExporter, PdfTeXExporter, SvgExporter

    public interface VectorialExporter
    This interface represents exporters into vectorial formats such as xfig...
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      FileCollection getFileCollection()
      Replies the collection of files that is used by this exporter.
      Progression getProgression()
      Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
      boolean isShadowExported()
      Replies if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
      boolean isShadowSupported()
      Replies if this exporter is able to create shadows of the vectorials figures.
      boolean isSpecificationCompliant()
      Replies if this exporter is able to create a target file inside which all the specifications from ViewGraphics2D were supported.
      void setFileCollection(FileCollection c)
      Set the collection of files that is used by this exporter.
      void setProgression(Progression model)
      Set the task progression model used by this reader.
      void setShadowExported(boolean export)
      Set if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
      void write(File output, Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
      Exports the specified figures and the associated model objects into a graph snipset in the given stream.
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      void      		 write(File output, G graph, ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
      Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.
      void write(OutputStream output, Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
      Exports the specified figures and the associated model objects into a graph snipset in the given stream.
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      void      		 write(OutputStream output, G graph, ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
      Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.

    • Method Detail

      • getProgression

        Progression getProgression()
        Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
        Returns:
        the task progression model.

      • setProgression

        void setProgression(Progression model)
        Set the task progression model used by this reader.
        Parameters:
        model - is the task progression model.

      • isShadowExported

        boolean isShadowExported()
        Replies if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
        Returns:
        true if the shadows of the objects are also exported.

      • setShadowExported

        void setShadowExported(boolean export)
        Set if the shadows of the objects are exported or not.
        Parameters:
        export - is true if the shadows of the objects are exported.

      • isSpecificationCompliant

        boolean isSpecificationCompliant()
        Replies if this exporter is able to create a target file inside which all the specifications from ViewGraphics2D were supported.
        Returns:
        true if the exporter completely support the ViewGraphics2D specifications; false if a part of the specifications are not supported.

      • isShadowSupported

        boolean isShadowSupported()
        Replies if this exporter is able to create shadows of the vectorials figures.
        Returns:
        true if the exporter is able to create shadows; false if not.

      • getFileCollection

        FileCollection getFileCollection()
        Replies the collection of files that is used by this exporter.

        A collection of files may be used by the exporter to create files associated to the file to export.

        Returns:
        the collection of files, or null if none.

      • setFileCollection

        void setFileCollection(FileCollection c)
        Set the collection of files that is used by this exporter.

        A collection of files may be used by the exporter to create files associated to the file to export.

        Parameters:
        c - is the collection of files, or null if none.

      • write

        <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> void write(File output,
                                    G graph,
                                    ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
           throws IOException
        Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.
        Parameters:
        output - is the output file
        graph - is the graph to write.
        container - is the container of figures to write.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        void write(File output,
         Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
           throws IOException
        Exports the specified figures and the associated model objects into a graph snipset in the given stream.
        Parameters:
        output - is the output file
        figures - are the figures to export.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> void write(OutputStream output,
                                    G graph,
                                    ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
           throws IOException
        Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.
        Parameters:
        output - is the output stream.
        graph - is the graph to write.
        container - is the container of figures to write.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        void write(OutputStream output,
         Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
           throws IOException
        Exports the specified figures and the associated model objects into a graph snipset in the given stream.
        Parameters:
        output - is the output stream.
        figures - are the figures to export.
        Throws:
        IOException
